title: Status Nashville 5 Speed Hand Mixer, Electric Hand Held Mixer, White, 150W, 1.3 Metre Cable, NASHVILLE1PKB4
features: 5 SPEED SETTINGS: Enjoy complete control with five adjustable speeds, perfect for everything from gentle whisking to powerful mixing for heavier ingredients.
POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: This hand mixer’s robust 150W motor easily handles all mixing tasks, making it ideal for preparing both light batters and dense doughs with ease.
1.3M CABLE LENGTH: With a generous 1.3-metre cable, you’ll have the flexibility to move freely around your kitchen as you mix.
ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Lightweight and crafted for comfort, this mixer fits perfectly in your hand, helping to reduce strain during extended mixing sessions.
EASY TO CLEAN: Designed for convenience, the detachable beaters can be removed effortlessly, making post-baking cleanup simple and quick.
description: Product Description This Status 150 W power hand mixer will take the hard work out of baking. This electric hand mixer has one pair of dishwasher safe beaters and five speeds for easy control mixing. Power output 150 W. Five speed settings. Includes one attachment: beaters, dishwasher safe parts. Box Contains 1 x Status Nashville 150w 5 Speed Hand Mixer
